## Task Description
A clear description of what needs to be done.

## Context
Background information to help you understand the task.

## Files to Look At
- `path/to/relevant/file.ts`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Task completed as described
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] PR linked to this issue

## Estimated Time
~1-2 hours
